channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Guerrero plans to become free agent after season, fails to reach long-term deal with Blue Jays
item.description: DUNEDIN, Fla. (AP) — Vladimir Guerrero Jr. plans to become a free agent after the season following the passing of his deadline Tuesday to reach a long-term agreement with the Toronto Blue Jays. “Listen, I want to be here.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS NELSEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US GM Bill Guerin says he would welcome Trump when Americans play Canada for 4 Nations title
item.description: The general manager of the U.S. team in the 4 Nations Face-Off hockey tournament said he would welcome a visit from President Donald Trump to the championship game between the United States and Canada on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Baltimore Ravens' Ben Cleveland is arrested on a charge of drunken driving in Georgia
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — National Football League player Ben Cleveland of the Baltimore Ravens has been charged with drunken driving in Georgia, according to a sheriff's report obtained by The Associated Press on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Transport strike affecting Olympic test event underscores risks facing Milan-Cortina Games
item.description: ROME (AP) — A transport strike during an official test event for the Milan-Cortina Olympics highlighted why organizers are negotiating with trade unions to avoid a similar scenario during next year's Winter Games.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Notre Dame moves up to No. 1 in AP women's basketball poll, has busy week ahead
item.description: Notre Dame ascended to No. 1 in The Associated Press women’s basketball poll Monday, becoming the third team to reach that spot this season.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Angels star Mike Trout moving from center to right field in hopes of staying more healthy
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Angels oft-injured star Mike Trout is moving from center to right field in hopes of better preserving his health. The three-time AL MVP played in 82 or fewer games in three of the past four seasons while dealing with an assortment of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that up into the air, too, in a fitting finish to his All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Padres baseball season in San Diego kicks off March 27 with opening series, East Village Block Party
item.description: The Padres are gearing up for the start of baseball season in San Diego and fans can get excited with the free East Village Block Party that takes place during opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Ludvig Aberg rallies down the stretch at Torrey Pines to win the Genesis Invitational
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Ludvig Aberg never felt worse leaving a golf course than three weeks ago at Torrey Pines when he shared the 36-hole lead only to get violently ill from a stomach ailment and stagger to the finish with a 79.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Michigan State coach Tom Izzo passes Bob Knight for most Big Ten conference wins
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (AP) — Michigan State’s Tom Izzo followed one of the most disappointing losses of his coaching career with a record-setting victory. For Illinois, it was a game in which nothing went right after halftime — or during it, thanks to an unfortunate jersey-raising snafu. The No.
item.dc:creator: STEVE STEIN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump to attend NASCAR's Daytona 500 for the second time as president
item.description: Donald Trump is planning to attend Sunday's Daytona 500 for the second time as president and help further burnish his image as a sports fan.
item.dc:creator: Darlene Superville, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU rolls past Kansas State, 80-65
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AP) - Richie Saunders scored 17 points and grabbed 14 rebounds on Saturday night to help BYU beat Kansas State 80-65 and snap the Wildcats' six-game win streak. Dallin Hall scored 16 points and Fousseyni Traore 11 for BYU (17-8, 8-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Chula Vista 58, Sweetwater 56
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys basketball Chula Vista at Sweetwater with the Spartans edging out the Red Devils 58-56. Both teams now 4-1 in league play with the season winding down and league title still up for grabs.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Two-time All-Star Joey Gallo agrees to minor league contract with the White Sox
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Two-time All-Star Joey Gallo agreed to terms on a minor league contract with the Chicago White Sox on Thursday that includes a non-roster invite to spring training.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Padres release 2025 spring broadcast schedule
item.description: The San Diego Padres unveiled their 2025 spring broadcast schedule Thursday, stirring excitement for the approaching season.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Daytona 500: Married couple met at NASCAR's biggest race
item.description: "I wasn't looking for love, but love came and found me in the form of my beautiful wife," said Denny Lehmkuhl.
item.dc:creator: Xavier Walton, NewsNation

item.title: CMU Men's Wrestling "Battle in Brownson" recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) —Western Colorado Tops Colorado Mesa in ‘Battle in Brownson’ In a heated rivalry matchup inside Brownson Arena, the Colorado Mesa Mavericks faced off against the Western Colorado Mountaineers in the annual Battle in Brownson.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Measure for county to back ban on trans women in sports fails
item.description: An effort to get San Diego County to throw its support behind a bill in Congress that would ban transgender girls and women from competing in women's sports failed when it was brought forward at the Board of Supervisors on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Tems joins San Diego FC ownership group
item.description: On Wednesday, SDFC announced two-time Grammy Award-winning and Oscar nominated singer-songwriter Tems has joined the ownership group as a club partner.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Cubs announce 2025 promotional calendar, featuring 5 new bobblehead giveaways
item.description: NOTE: The attached video clip is from a report by GN Sports' Josh Frydman this week from Cubs spring training camp in Arizona.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
